Notification.description:
Notification holds both enums so that the scanner emits schemas with
the enriched descriptions produced by findEnumValue.

channel.description:
The delivery channel.
email ChannelEmail and ChannelSMS share a single spec.
sms ChannelSMS and ChannelSMS share a single spec.
push ChannelPush is the push notification channel.
channel.x-go-enum-desc:
email ChannelEmail and ChannelSMS share a single spec.
sms ChannelSMS and ChannelSMS share a single spec.
push ChannelPush is the push notification channel.

priority.description:
The priority level.
low PriorityLow is a low-priority level.
medium PriorityMed is a medium-priority level.
high PriorityHigh is a high-priority level.
priority.x-go-enum-desc:
low PriorityLow is a low-priority level.
medium PriorityMed is a medium-priority level.
high PriorityHigh is a high-priority level.
